name: Surfer Slam Bam
description: Surfer Slam Bam has ridden a huge wave into the Kingdom.
biography: Surfer Slam Bam is the Summer counterpart of Slam Bam. He was available exclusively on Skylanders: Lost Islands during the month of June 2013.
quote: Surfer Slam Bam has ridden a huge wave into the Kingdom.
personality: Not much is known about Surfer Slam Bam's personality, other than his association with summer and surfing themes.

story.content: Surfer Slam Bam is the Summer counterpart of Slam Bam. He was available exclusively on Skylanders: Lost Islands during the month of June 2013.

content: Surfer Slam Bam has ridden a huge wave into the Kingdom.

trivia: Surfer Slam Bam is the first summer themed variant.
He is the first non-Legendary variant of a Water elemental Skylander.
He is the first Alter Ego to have exclusive character artwork.
gameplay: Surfer Slam Bam was available exclusively on Skylanders: Lost Islands during the month of June 2013. As an Alter Ego, he is a non-playable character in the main console games and does not possess a traditional move set.
